name: promptquarantine
description: Local-first CLI for quarantining untrusted prompt content.

scripts.smoke: node dist/cli.js --help && node dist/cli.js scan test/fixtures/benign.md && node dist/cli.js manifest test/fixtures/hostile-issue.md
scripts.release:check: npm run check && npm test && npm run smoke && npm run package:smoke

author: Roger Chappel
